title: kelseya uniflora
intro: Kelseya uniflora, also known as Wyoming sarsaparilla, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America, characterized by its single flower spike and hairy leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Kelseya uniflora include reducing fever and relieving rheumatic pain, as well as acting as a diuretic to aid in kidney function. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Kelseya uniflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
